name: pingpt-extension
description: Pin individual ChatGPT messages, not the entire chat. Add custom names and tags, search instantly, and jump back to the original conversation. Features dark mode support for comfortable viewing.

scripts.clean: rm -rf build && rm -rf pack && rm -rf extension/common/icons/*.png && rm -rf website/images/*.png && rm -rf website/images/favicon.ico && rm -rf assets/icons/
scripts.copy:website-icons: mkdir -p website/images && cp assets/icons/favicon-*.png assets/icons/favicon.ico website/images/
scripts.copy:icons: npm run copy:extension-icons && npm run copy:website-icons
scripts.build:chrome: npm run build:assets && npm run copy:icons && rm -rf build/chrome && mkdir -p build/chrome && cp -r extension/common/* build/chrome/ && cp extension/chrome/idb.js build/chrome/ && cp extension/chrome/manifest.json build/chrome/ && node scripts/replace-browser-text.js chrome build/chrome/popup.html
scripts.build:firefox: npm run build:assets && npm run copy:icons && rm -rf build/firefox && mkdir -p build/firefox && cp -r extension/common/* build/firefox/ && cp extension/firefox/idb.js build/firefox/ && cp extension/firefox/manifest.json build/firefox/ && node scripts/replace-browser-text.js firefox build/firefox/popup.html
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.pack: npm run pack:chrome && npm run pack:firefox
scripts.dev:chrome: npm run build:chrome && echo 'Load build/chrome in Chrome'
scripts.dev:firefox: npm run build:firefox && echo 'Load build/firefox in Firefox'
scripts.dev: npm run build && echo 'Built both Chrome and Firefox versions'
scripts.build:website: npm run build:assets && npm run copy:website-icons
scripts.dev:website: npm run copy:website-icons && cd website && python3 -m http.server 8080
scripts.validate:seo: echo 'Validating SEO files...' && echo 'Sitemap: http://localhost:8080/sitemap.xml' && echo 'Robots: http://localhost:8080/robots.txt'
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run pack
scripts.feedback:setup: echo '🚀 Feedback Setup:' && echo '1. Create GitHub token: https://github.com/settings/tokens' && echo '2. Run: vercel env add GITHUB_TOKEN' && echo '3. Run: npm run deploy' && echo '4. Test: npm run feedback:test'
